Title: BPEL.BPEL.script_upload
Description: Upload a new BPEL script source

BPEL.BPEL.script_upload uploads a new BPEL script, makes expanded version,
	and put into edit mode. If content is supplied the function will not try to download or check
	the URL specified.
Examples:
SQL> select BPEL.BPEL.script_upload ('LoanFlow', 'file:/LoanFlow.bpel', null);
	  unnamed
	  INTEGER
	  _______________________________________________________________________________
	  1
